case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JUNTAO ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100033463) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JACK H. POGOSIAN, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-20-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-05-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, JUNTAO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2018
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62765853)
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-26-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
